content.problemStatement:
Sereja has an array consisting of nnn integers a1‚ÄČ‚Č§a2‚ÄČ‚Č§‚Ä¶‚Č§ana_{1} ‚ÄČ\leq a_{2} ‚ÄČ\leq \ldots \leq a_{n}a1‚Äč‚ÄČ‚Č§a2‚Äč‚ÄČ‚Č§‚Ä¶‚Č§an‚Äč. Based on this array, he has to answer mmm queries represented by pairs integers ttt and ddd.

The answer for a query is the smallest integer iii for which there exist some kkk (i‚ÄČ‚Č§‚ÄČki‚ÄČ \leq‚ÄČ ki‚ÄČ‚Č§‚ÄČk) such that ai‚ÄČ+‚ÄČd‚ÄČ‚Č•‚ÄČai‚ÄČ+‚ÄČ1a_{i}‚ÄČ+‚ÄČd‚ÄČ \geq ‚ÄČa_{i‚ÄČ+‚ÄČ1}ai‚Äč‚ÄČ+‚ÄČd‚ÄČ‚Č•‚ÄČai‚ÄČ+‚ÄČ1‚Äč, ai‚ÄČ+‚ÄČ1‚ÄČ+‚ÄČd‚ÄČ‚Č•‚ÄČai‚ÄČ+‚ÄČ2a_{i‚ÄČ+‚ÄČ1}‚ÄČ+‚ÄČd‚ÄČ \geq ‚ÄČa_{i‚ÄČ+‚ÄČ2}ai‚ÄČ+‚ÄČ1‚Äč‚ÄČ+‚ÄČd‚ÄČ‚Č•‚ÄČai‚ÄČ+‚ÄČ2‚Äč, ‚Ä¶\ldots‚Ä¶, ak‚ÄČ‚ąí‚ÄČ1‚ÄČ+‚ÄČd‚Č•‚ÄČaka_{k‚ÄČ-‚ÄČ1}‚ÄČ + ‚ÄČd \geq ‚ÄČa_{k}ak‚ÄČ‚ąí‚ÄČ1‚Äč‚ÄČ+‚ÄČd‚Č•‚ÄČak‚Äč, ak‚ÄČ‚Č§‚ÄČta_{k} ‚ÄČ\leq ‚ÄČtak‚Äč‚ÄČ‚Č§‚ÄČt and ak+1‚ÄČ>‚ÄČta_{k+1}‚ÄČ>‚ÄČtak+1‚Äč‚ÄČ>‚ÄČt (if it exists).

Help Sereja find the answer for each query.
content.inputFormat:
First line of input contains a single integer nnn
Next line contain nnn space separated integers a1a_{1}a1‚Äč, a2a_{2}a2‚Äč, ........., ana_{n}an‚Äč.
Next line contains a single integer mmm.
Next mmm lines contain pairs of integers representing the queries.
content.outputFormat: For each query, output the answer on a separate line.
